introLines.text: Vern, what I'm about to tell you could change everything.
I've kept this secret for years. Tonight, I'm finally speaking out.
They told me never to talk about this. But people deserve to know.

detailLines.text: I have proof. Documentation. Testimony. Everything they tried to suppress.
What I witnessed changes our understanding of reality itself.
The implications are staggering. And they've known all along.

defenseLines.text: I've sacrificed everything to bring this forward. Why would I lie?
They've tried to silence me. That alone tells you I'm onto something.
The truth is undeniable. No matter how much they try to bury it.

acceptanceLines.text: You're one of the few who'll let the truth be heard.
The world is waking up, Vern. Thanks to people like you.

extraDetailLines.text: But that's not all. There's a deeper layer to this that I've never shared publicly.
The documents I recovered paint an even more disturbing picture.
I've connected with others who've had similar experiences. The pattern is unmistakable.

extraDefenseLines.text: I have contingencies in place. If something happens to me, the information goes public.
My credentials are verifiable. My record is clean. I have no reason to fabricate this.
The people who've tried to discredit me only prove how important this information is.

conclusionLines.text: Keep fighting the good fight, Vern. The truth will prevail.
Stay safe out there. They're always watching.
This is just the beginning. More will come forward.
